HIVAIDS_1YR_MEDICAID Human Immunodeficiency Virus and/or Acquired Immunodeficiency Syndrome (HIV/AIDS) First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicaid Only Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
 HIVAIDS_1YR_MEDICARE Human Immunodeficiency Virus and/or Acquired Immunodeficiency Syndrome (HIV/AIDS) First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicare Only Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
